proof: function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or (if x0 ∈ x1 { x1.unique } else { List.cons[T0](x0, x1.unique) }) = x2.unique }[T](head, tail, cons_list)

let w0: T satisfy { exists(k0: List[T]) { p(k0) and not p(List.cons(w0, k0)) } }
